# authn (code repo) — LLM doc index

> authn is the Krateo authentication service: a small stateless Go HTTP server that turns a
> successful login (basic / LDAP / OAuth2 / OIDC) into a short-lived, per-user **client-cert
> kubeconfig** (minted via the Kubernetes CSR API) plus an optional JWT, and lists the
> login strategies the frontend should render. This index is the agent entry point to the
> **internals & runtime** view. The **deployment, CRD and wiring** view lives in the chart repo
> `braghettos/krateo-authn-chart` `docs/`.

## How to use this index (agents)

You are reading the docs for a SPECIFIC deployed version. Fetch every file below **at the tag that
matches the running build**, not `main`:
- image version = the authn Deployment's container image tag (→ THIS repo's tag, == the chart `appVersion`);
- chart version = `CompositionDefinition.spec.chart.version` for authn (→ the `krateo-authn-chart` repo tag).

Read this repo's docs at the **image-version** tag. If something isn't in the docs, read the source
at that same tag — don't guess, and don't trust `main` for a deployed older version.

## Start here

- [docs/architecture.md](architecture.md): how the service is built — `main.go` boot, the route
  table, the `Route` interface, the kubeconfig generator, and the four auth packages. Read first.
- [docs/behavior.md](behavior.md): the HTTP endpoints it serves, the four CRDs it reads, the
  login/response contract, and its integration contracts (snowplow RESTAction, Kubernetes CSR).
- [docs/gotchas.md](gotchas.md): real runtime pitfalls grounded in the code/config.

## Reference (source of truth)

- `main.go` — server wiring: flags/env, route registration, CORS, graceful shutdown.
- `apis/authn/*/v1alpha1/types.go` + `apis/authn/oauth/types.go` — the Go types behind the four CRDs.
- `crds/*.yaml` — the generated CRD manifests this repo owns.
- `internal/routes/` — the `Route` interface and every endpoint handler.
- `README.md` — product-facing overview and `curl` examples.

## Companion doc set

The deployment + CRD + wiring view is versioned independently in
`braghettos/krateo-authn-chart` `docs/` (read it at the **chart-version** tag). Each set
cross-links the other; each is versioned in its own repo.
